name: Blackwing - Twin Shadow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ツインシャドウ
desc: Shuffle 2 of your "Blackwing" monsters (1 Tuner and 1 non-Tuner) that are banished and/or in your GY into the Deck/Extra Deck; Special Summon 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster or "Black-Winged Dragon" from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels of those 2 monsters. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.) If you control 2 or more "Blackwing" monsters, you can activate this card from your hand. You can only activate 1 "Blackwing - Twin Shadow" per turn.
eff: Shuffle 2 of your "Blackwing" monsters (1 Tuner and 1 non-Tuner) that are banished and/or in your GY into the Deck/Extra Deck; Special Summon 1 "Blackwing" Synchro Monster or "Black-Winged Dragon" from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels of those 2 monsters. (This is treated as a Synchro Summon.) If you control 2 or more "Blackwing" monsters, you can activate this card from your hand. You can only activate 1 "Blackwing - Twin Shadow" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Returns from Graveyard to Deck for cost
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck for cost
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck for cost
mst: Can be activated from the hand
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Synchro Summon
